## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Version strings updated if user-facing (`0.2.1+` install pins, CI `0.2.2` where applicable)
- [ ] Public doc copy follows project voice (BLUF, honest limits, no hype — see CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if shipping behavior changes
- [ ] `SPEC.md` + `vectors/` updated if wire format changed
- [ ] No production keys or real device IDs in fixtures
